test.name: FamilySearch wiki — census records
test.description: User asks how to use census records on FamilySearch. Also verifies slug normalization — topic 'census records' should save as census-records.md.

input.user_message: Search the FamilySearch wiki for how to use census records to trace my family

judge_context: Should call wiki_search with a query about using census records on FamilySearch
The saved file should be named census-records.md — lowercase, hyphenated, no extra characters
Summary should only reflect what the wiki actually said — no invented census years, states, or coverage details
